name: Fizz
description: Champagne bubbles — hollow rings and bright sparks — drifting through amber, finding new positions with every pour of the seed.

code.style: --bub: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --b1: @rand(20%, 46%); --b2: @rand(8%, 18%); --fx1: @rand(6%, 60%); --fy1: @rand(4%, 70%); --fx2: @rand(12%, 78%); --fy2: @rand(8%, 80%); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: var(--b1); left: var(--fx1); top: var(--fy1); border: calc(26px / @Y) solid var(--bub); border-radius: 50%; opacity: 0.85; transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: var(--b2); left: var(--fx2); top: var(--fy2); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color4); opacity: 0.6; transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
